ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Text field for patient's medical history */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider name */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "next_of_kin_name" TEXT /* Name of the next of kin */,
  "next_of_kin_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the next of kin */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Text field for patient's allergies */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status of the patient */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last visit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (surgical or medical) */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the treatment */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who administered the treatment */,
  "nurse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nurse who assisted in the treatment */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the treatment was administered */,
  "treatment_cost" REAL /* Cost of the treatment */,
  "prescription_details" TEXT /* Details of the prescription */,
  "referral_id" TEXT /* ID of the referral to another specialist */,
  "follow_up_notes" TEXT /* Notes for follow-up appointments */,
  "consent_form" TEXT /* Consent form details */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_nurse_id FOREIGN KEY ("nurse_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satisfaction_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction survey */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who took the survey */,
  "satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Satisfaction score (1-100) */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the patient */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey (e.g., post-treatment, post-discharge) */,
  "survey_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the survey */,
  "survey_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the survey */,
  "survey_version" TEXT /* Version of the survey */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method of conducting the survey (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satisfaction_surveys_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anxiety_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anxiety assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who took the assessment */,
  "anxiety_score" REAL /* Anxiety score (0-10) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the patient */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of the assessment (e.g., pre-treatment, post-treatment) */,
  "assessment_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the assessment */,
  "assessment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the assessment */,
  "assessment_version" TEXT /* Version of the assessment */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method of conducting the assessment (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anxiety_assessments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_records" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient whose condition is being assessed */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "severity_score" INTEGER /* Severity score (1-100) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the healthcare provider */,
  "assessment_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the assessment */,
  "assessment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the assessment */,
  "assessment_version" TEXT /* Version of the assessment */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method of conducting the assessment (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "next_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date for the next assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the severity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the severity record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_severity_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the user */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
